allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix warranty pattern matching bug for 36-month warranties

The normalize_garantia_to_days\(\) function was incorrectly matching
"6 MESES" before "36 MESES" because it''s a substring. Now sorts
patterns by length \(longest first\) to ensure correct matching.

This fixes items like W7HX1-4019454 that were showing 183 days
\(6 months\) instead of 1095 days \(36 months\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
